text.title: api-monitoring Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-monitoring as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding request_id or user_id as a Prometheus label.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cardinality explosion: each unique ID is a new time series; Prometheus OOMs within hours on moderate traffic.

failure-mode.description: Double-logging: both middleware and handler log the same request.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inflates log volume 2x; costs and noise increase with no diagnostic benefit.
